subject: Anthropology
title: The Future of Anthropology
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on The Future of Anthropology.

hook.text: AI writes text. Robots explore Mars. Genes are edited in labs. What does it mean to be human now?

buildup.text: Anthropology's core question — what is human? — grows more urgent as technology reshapes our species.

discovery.text: New frontiers include multispecies ethnography, space anthropology, and the study of human-AI relationships.

twist.text: As the world grows more connected and more divided, the need for cross-cultural understanding only increases.

climax.text: Anthropology's future is wherever humans go — and whatever we become along the way.

punchline.text: The study of humanity never finishes.

quiz.question: What new frontiers does anthropology explore?
options: Multispecies ethnography, space, and human-AI relationships
